property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-21.0.6.7-hotspot\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-21.0.6.7-hotspot\bin;C:\Program Files\Microsoft MPI\Bin\;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\MinGW\bin;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\150\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\160\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\160\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\160\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\160\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;F:\LapTrinhThietBiDiDong\flutter\bin;F:\MinGW\bin;C:\Program Files\Cloudflare\Cloudflare WARP\;C:\Program Files\Go\bin;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Users\Asus\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\Scripts\;C:\Users\Asus\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\;C:\Users\Asus\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\Azure Data Studio\bin;C:\Users\Asus\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Program Files\Azure Data Studio\bin;C:\Program Files\Azure Data Studio\bin;C:\Users\Asus\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;C:\Users\Asus\.dotnet\tools;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition 2025.1.1.1\bin;;F:\LapTrinhThietBiDiDong\flutter\bin;C:\Users\Asus\go\bin;.

testcase.name: createPrescription_validationFailed_missingPatient
testcase.system-out:
04:17:18.858 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.project.controller.PrescriptionControllerTest]: PrescriptionControllerTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 04:17:19.364 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.project.BackendApplication for test class com.project.controller.PrescriptionControllerTest

2026-05-30T04:17:27.932+07:00 INFO 11692 --- [backend] [ main] c.p.c.PrescriptionControllerTest : Started PrescriptionControllerTest in 8.294 seconds (process running for 10.523) 2026-05-30T04:17:27.982+07:00 INFO 11692 --- [backend] [ main] com.project.BackendApplication : Checking data for user: admin@care.com 2026-05-30T04:17:28.061+07:00 INFO 11692 --- [backend] [ main] com.project.BackendApplication : Admin user not found. Seeding system admin... 2026-05-30T04:17:28.063+07:00 INFO 11692 --- [backend] [ main] com.project.BackendApplication : No patients found. Seeding a mock patient for development... 2026-05-30T04:17:28.065+07:00 INFO 11692 --- [backend] [ main] com.project.BackendApplication : Mock data seeded successfully. 2026-05-30T04:17:28.712+07:00 DEBUG 11692 --- [backend] [ main] s.w.s.m.m.a.RequestMappingHandlerMapping : Mapped to com.project.controller.PrescriptionController#createPrescription(PrescriptionRequest) 2026-05-30T04:17:28.829+07:00 DEBUG 11692 --- [backend] [ main] m.m.a.RequestResponseBodyMethodProcessor : Read "application/json" to [PrescriptionRequest(patientId=null, diagnosis=Sot sieu vi, notes=Nghi ngoi nhieu, items=[Prescriptio (truncated)...] 2026-05-30T04:17:29.027+07:00 DEBUG 11692 --- [backend] [ main] .m.m.a.ExceptionHandlerExceptionResolver : Using @ExceptionHandler com.project.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler#handleValidationExceptions(MethodArgumentNotValidException) 2026-05-30T04:17:29.028+07:00 WARN 11692 --- [backend] [ main] c.p.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Validation failed: {patientId=Patient ID is required} 2026-05-30T04:17:29.048+07:00 DEBUG 11692 --- [backend] [ main] o.s.w.s.m.m.a.HttpEntityMethodProcessor : Using 'application/json', given [*/*] and supported [application/json, application/*+json] 2026-05-30T04:17:29.053+07:00 DEBUG 11692 --- [backend] [ main] o.s.w.s.m.m.a.HttpEntityMethodProcessor : Writing [ApiResponse(success=false, message=Validation failed, data={patientId=Patient ID is required})] 2026-05-30T04:17:29.072+07:00 DEBUG 11692 --- [backend] [ main] .m.m.a.ExceptionHandlerExceptionResolver : Resolved [org.springframework.web.bind.MethodArgumentNotValidException: Validation failed for argument [0] in public com.project.dto.response.ApiResponse<com.project.dto.response.PrescriptionResponse> com.project.controller.PrescriptionController.createPrescription(com.project.dto.request.PrescriptionRequest): [Field error in object 'prescriptionRequest' on field 'patientId': rejected value [null]; codes [NotNull.prescriptionRequest.patientId,NotNull.patientId,NotNull.java.lang.Long,NotNull]; arguments [org.springframework.context.support.DefaultMessageSourceResolvable: codes [prescriptionRequest.patientId,patientId]; arguments []; default message [patientId]]; default message [Patient ID is required]] ]

testcase.name: getPrescriptions_success
